description: Initializes the switched shunt fetching routine ‘NXTSWS’ for returning switched shunts attached to bus IBUS. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = inisws(ibus)

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘NXTSWS’ may not be used.
Bus has no switched shunts; ‘NXTSWS’ may not be used.
